name: Mr. Stox Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb bacon; cut crosswise into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans in water to cover in refrigerator overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the beans in a colander.
3. Cook bacon in a large pot until almost browned.
4. Add onion, bell pepper, carrot, celery, cilantro, and garlic to the pot. Sauté over medium heat until vegetables are tender (10-12 minutes).
5. Add beans and chicken stock to the pot. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until beans are soft, about 1 hour.
7. Puree soup in batches using a blender.
8. Strain the pureed soup back into the pot.
9. Season to taste with chili powder, salt, and pepper.
10. Serve in wide-rimmed soup bowls and garnish with salsa and crema if desired.
